title: Andy's Immortal Snail
description: Adds my idea of the immortal snail.
body:
Yippie!
# DOES NOT WORK IN MULTIPLAYER!
adds the immortal snail! 

it loads chunks! it will stop at nothing to kill you not even C mode can save you!
it will slowly move too you and will brake and place blocks to achieve this so don't play with worlds you care about! As the game gose on the snail will get faster with no limmits so there will be a time where the snail is faster then you! You will be givin items to help you with the snail. Look for a snail shell block (it is a container) it has:
- The Snail Scanner (Will beep faster the closer the snail is to you)
- Salt Shaker (Will place salt which can temporarily stun the snail)
- Dooms Day Clock (Will tell you how long it will take for the snail to get faster)

there is a difficulty system for him at start of the world
- Easy
- Normal
- Hard

**- BTW there is only one snail per world -**
![the immortal snail about 2 kill me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc050cfdb03acf79d2e37d1893d413d618552c1e.png)
